claim: No Stable, release, conformance, manual assistive-technology, package-parity, or publication claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.nativeBasis: span or div with unchanged child semantics.
semantics.accessibilityTree: Content remains present and nameable; hidden, aria-hidden, display:none, and visibility:hidden are never applied.
semantics.focus: revealOnFocus restores normal geometry only for focus-visible and supplies a forced-colors-safe indicator.

layout.hiddenGeometry: One CSS pixel with clipping and no layout contribution.
layout.reveal: A fixed logical-start surface prevents ancestor clipping and remains readable at text zoom.
layout.direction: Logical inset and padding properties support LTR and RTL.

consumerResponsibilities: Do not duplicate visible information unnecessarily for screen-reader users.
Use revealOnFocus only for content that can actually receive or contain focus.
Supply meaningful localized text and preserve a logical skip-link destination.
